assess.example: The teacher will assess our projects.
assess.example_zh: 老師會評量我們的專題。

astonish.example: The magic trick astonished the crowd.
astonish.example_zh: 那魔術讓觀眾大為驚訝。

athletics.example: She is good at athletics, especially running.
athletics.example_zh: 她擅長運動，尤其是跑步。

attendance.example: Attendance at the meeting was high.

attic.example: Old toys are stored in the attic.

attorney.example: The attorney defended her client well.
attorney.example_zh: 那位律師為她的當事人辯護得很好。

attribute.example: She attributes her success to hard work.

attribute.example_zh: 耐心是一項重要的特質。

auction.example: The painting was sold at an auction.
auction.example_zh: 那幅畫在拍賣會上賣出。
他們拍賣了那些舊家具。

authorize.example: Only the manager can authorize a refund.

autonomy.example: The region was given more autonomy.
autonomy.example_zh: 這個地區被賦予更多自治權。

awe.example: We stood in awe of the giant waterfall.
awe.example_zh: 我們敬畏地望著巨大的瀑布。

backyard.example: The kids played in the backyard.

ballot.example: Each voter placed a ballot in the box.
ballot.example_zh: 每位選民把選票投進箱子。

ban.example: The park has a ban on littering.
They banned cars from the old town.
ban.example_zh: 他們禁止汽車進入老城區。

banner.example: They hung a welcome banner over the door.
banner.example_zh: 他們在門上掛了歡迎布條。

barren.example: Nothing grows in the barren land.
barren.example_zh: 這片貧瘠的土地寸草不生。

batch.example: She baked a fresh batch of cookies.

behalf.example: She spoke on behalf of the whole class.

belongings.example: Please keep your belongings with you.

beloved.example: The beloved teacher retired this year.
beloved.example_zh: 那位深受愛戴的老師今年退休。

beneficial.example: Exercise is beneficial to your health.

betray.example: He would never betray a friend.

beware.example: Beware of the dog at the gate.

bias.example: A good judge has no bias.

bid.example: He made a high bid at the auction.
bid.example_zh: 他在拍賣會上出了高價。

bid.example: Several firms bid for the project.
bid.example_zh: 好幾家公司競標這個案子。

biological.example: We studied biological changes in plants.
biological.example_zh: 我們研究植物的生物變化。

bizarre.example: She told a bizarre story about a ghost.
bizarre.example_zh: 她講了一個離奇的鬼故事。

blast.example: The blast from the firework was loud.
Workers blasted a hole in the rock.
blast.example_zh: 工人炸開岩石上一個洞。

blur.example: Without my glasses, the words are a blur.
blur.example_zh: 沒戴眼鏡，字都糊成一片。

blush.example: She began to blush when praised.
blush.example_zh: 受到稱讚時她開始臉紅。

blush.example: A blush spread across his face.

bodyguard.example: The star has a tall bodyguard.
bodyguard.example_zh: 那位明星有個高大的保鑣。

bolt.example: He tightened the bolt with a tool.

bonus.example: She got a year-end bonus at work.
bonus.example_zh: 她在工作上領到年終獎金。

boom.example: The town saw an economic boom.
boom.example_zh: 這座城鎮迎來經濟繁榮。

boost.example: Winning the game boosted their confidence.
boost.example_zh: 贏得比賽提升了他們的信心。

boost.example: The good news gave us a boost.
boost.example_zh: 這好消息讓我們士氣大振。

booth.example: We bought tickets at the booth.

boredom.example: She read a book to escape boredom.

bound.example: This train is bound for Taipei.

boundary.example: The fence marks the boundary of the yard.

boxer.example: The boxer trained hard for the match.
boxer.example_zh: 拳擊手為比賽努力訓練。

breakthrough.example: The new medicine was a major breakthrough.

briefcase.example: He carried a leather briefcase to work.
briefcase.example_zh: 他提著皮製公事包去上班。

bronze.example: She won a bronze medal in swimming.
bronze.example_zh: 她在游泳項目贏得銅牌。

browse.example: I like to browse books at the store.
browse.example_zh: 我喜歡在書店隨意翻書。

bruise.example: He got a bruise on his arm from the fall.
She bruised her knee on the table.
bruise.example_zh: 她的膝蓋在桌子上撞瘀了。

bulk.example: The bulk of the work is already done.
bulk.example_zh: 大部分的工作已經完成。

bully.example: We must not let anyone bully others.
bully.example_zh: 我們絕不能讓任何人欺負別人。

bully.example: The bully picked on smaller kids.
bully.example_zh: 那個惡霸欺負比較小的孩子。

bureau.example: She works at the weather bureau.

bureaucracy.example: Too much bureaucracy slows things down.
bureaucracy.example_zh: 太多官僚程序會拖慢事情。

burial.example: The burial took place at the cemetery.

butcher.example: The butcher cut the meat into pieces.
They butchered a pig for the feast.
butcher.example_zh: 他們宰了一頭豬辦宴席。

canal.example: Boats travel through the city's canals.
canal.example_zh: 船隻在城市的運河中航行。

canvas.example: The artist painted on a large canvas.
canvas.example_zh: 藝術家在一塊大畫布上作畫。

capability.example: She has the capability to lead the team.

carbon.example_zh: 汽車排放有害的碳氣體。

carnival.example: The town held a colorful carnival.
carnival.example_zh: 鎮上舉辦了一場繽紛的嘉年華。

casino.example: Gambling at a casino can be risky.
casino.example_zh: 在賭場賭博可能很冒險。
